species.notes: Cat support is identified in source curation but not yet runtime-normalized.

species_manifest.scientific_scope: Species-aware ancient-DNA intake and review boundary. Support status describes evidence readiness, not broad scientific sufficiency.
species_manifest.runtime_scope: Current runtime normalization and reporting remain human AADR-first until species-specific collectors and archive bridges are implemented.

analysis_boundary: Paper-pinned core domestication support exists for this species. Curated projects are fit for governed comparative use, while pending projects still need stronger archive-paper linkage. Normalized runtime ingestion is not yet fully implemented for this species; curated accession-backed sample loading is available, while site extraction and richer runtime ingestion remain incomplete.
